content.query:
SELECT distinct
lds.Division
,srs.[SourceCode] as Source
,srs.[LeadSubSource]
,lds.LeadID
,lds.CustomerID
,lds.EntryDate
,cst.[FirstName]
,cst.[LastName]
,cst.[Address1]
,cst.[Address2]
,cst.[City]
,cst.[State]
,cst.[Zip]
,cst.[Phone]
,cst.[Email]
,lds.[ProductID]
,prd.ProductName
,brn.LongName as Market
,dsp.Disposition
,app.SetDate as AppointmentSetDate
,app.ApptDate as AppointmentDate
,case 
    when jbs.LP_JobStatusCategoryID is NULL then 'False'
    when jbs.LP_JobStatusCategoryID in (3,5) then 'False'
    else 'True'
end as Sold
,case 
    when jbs.LP_JobStatusCategoryID is NULL then 0
    when jbs.LP_JobStatusCategoryID in (3,5) then 0 
    else job.GrossAmount
end as NetSales
,job.GrossAmount as GrossSales
,job.JobID
,jbs.JobStatus
,jsc.JobStatusCategory
,job.ContractDate as [JobContractDate]
,lds.[LeadScore_ExpectedValueRank]
,lds.[LeadScore_LogisticRegressionRank]
,lds.[LeadScore_RegressionRank]
,lds.[LeadScore_Initial_LikelihoodToBuy]
,lds.[LeadScore_Initial_LikelySaleAmount]
,lds.[LeadScore_Initial_ExpectedValue]
,lds.[LeadScore_Current_LikelihoodToBuy]
,lds.[LeadScore_Current_LikelySaleAmount]
,lds.[LeadScore_Current_ExpectedValue]
FROM 
[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
,[EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs
,[EDW].[DIM_DISPOSITION] dsp
,[EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
,[EDW].[DIM_BRANCH] brn
,[EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT] prd
,(select LeadID, max(SetDate) as SetDate, max(ApptDate) as ApptDate from [EDW].[FACT_APPOINTMENT] group by LeadID) app
,[EDW].[FACT_JOB] job
,[EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS] jbs
,[EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS_CATEGORY] jsc
WHERE
lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
and lds.DispositionID = dsp.DispositionID
and lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
and lds.BranchID = brn.BranchID
and lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
and lds.LeadID = app.LeadID
and lds.LeadID = job.LeadID
and job.JobStatusID = jbs.JobStatusID
and jbs.JobStatusCategoryID = jsc.JobStatusCategoryID
and lds.Sold = 'True'
